hero.subtitle: Get service from your locality for your perfect house.

build_dream.heading: Build Your
build_dream.feat1_desc: Every worker undergoes thorough background checks and verification. Build trust with certified professionals.
build_dream.feat2_desc: Access to registered and licensed dealers offering genuine materials with quality guarantees and warranty support.
build_dream.feat3_desc: Architects, engineers, and designers with proven experience and certifications for your projects.
build_dream.feat4_desc: No middlemen, no hidden charges. Connect directly and get honest quotes and fair rates.

skilled.heading: Skilled Professionals
skilled.subheading: Find the right expert for your needs

how_it_works.heading: How It
how_it_works.subheading: Simple, transparent, and secure - from posting your project to completion
how_it_works.step1_desc: Browse verified professionals, quality materials, and design services in your area
how_it_works.step2_desc: Share your requirements and receive competitive quotes from multiple service providers
how_it_works.step3_desc: Pay securely through our escrow system - funds are protected until work is completed
how_it_works.step4_desc: Approve the work, release payment, and share your experience with the community

grow_business.heading: Dhanda
grow_business.benefit1: Reach more customers across your city by making your business visible online, helping nearby users easily find and choose your services.
grow_business.benefit2: Enable online booking and order placement so customers can place requests anytime, while you receive all orders digitally.
grow_business.benefit3: Sell faster by reducing waiting time, managing orders efficiently, and handling multiple requests smoothly.

professional_reg.heading: Are you a
professional_reg.labour_desc: Join our platform to find construction and labor work opportunities
professional_reg.househelp_desc: Connect with families looking for trusted household assistance
professional_reg.professional_desc: Plumber, Electrician, Carpenter, and other skilled professionals

service_areas.heading: Service
service_areas.jaipur_desc: We're starting our journey in the Pink City, connecting all construction services, skilled professionals, and material suppliers with customers across Jaipur.
service_areas.expand_desc: Our vision is to connect every city and town in India, making quality construction services accessible to everyone, everywhere.

download.heading: Mobile App
download.subtitle: We're working on native mobile apps for iOS and Android to give you an even better experience. Manage your projects, connect with professionals, and track orders - all from your pocket.
download.badge: 📱 For now, enjoy our fully responsive web platform on any device
download.feat1_desc: Get real-time updates on quotes, bookings, and project status
download.feat2_desc: View saved projects and contacts even without internet
download.feat3_desc: Book services, order materials, and chat with one tap

mission.heading: Our
mission.para1: To empower local businesses, skilled professionals, and communities by creating a seamless digital platform that connects service providers with customers, fostering trust, transparency, and growth in the construction and service industry.
mission.para2: We're building a comprehensive marketplace where homeowners can discover verified workers, quality materials, and expert professionals—all in one place.
mission.para3: From skilled laborers and house help to material suppliers and design professionals, Grihvo creates opportunities for everyone in the construction ecosystem.
mission.para4: Together, we're transforming how India builds—one connection, one project, one dream home at a time.
